    Welcome to my new site!

    The time had come for a slight restructure of my site, with a clear out of old content and a revamp of the layout! I am therefore very pleased to welcome you to DrDanSkinner.co.uk.

    As part of this restructuring I have added a News page, which will feature blog-style posts about new publications, events I have attended, and other research updates.

    You can find my publication list on the Publications page, and all of my contact details can be found at Contact me.

    Updated: June 19, 2026
